channel.title: GitHub Gleam Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of Gleam in GitHub

item.title: lustre-labs/lustre
item.description: An Elm-inspired framework for building HTML templates, single page applications, and server-rendered components in Gleam!

item.title: gleam-wisp/wisp
item.description: 🧚 A practical web framework for Gleam

item.title: gleam-lang/awesome-gleam
item.description: 💯 A collection of Gleam libraries, projects, and resources

item.title: gleam-lang/otp
item.description: 📫 Fault tolerant multicore programs with actors
